title: MY DISCOVERY PASS - 211info
text: MULTNOMAH COUNTY LIBRARY MY DISCOVERY PASS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers educational and cultural experiences. Library cardholders are able to use the pass to download tickets to participating museums, performances, and other attractions. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
